description: Customer escalated restroom cleanliness — soap dispensers empty, paper towel dispenser jammed. Third report this quarter.
Alarm triggered during evening cleaning. Security contacted. No breach confirmed. Incident report filed with building management.
Carlos Mendez replacing Maria Santos on HQ route. Orientation completed Mar 17. Buddy-shift scheduled for Mar 24.
Score 61/100. Restrooms 4/10, lobby 8/10, kitchen 7/10, floors 5/10. Corrective action plan sent to supervisor. Re-inspect scheduled Apr 7.
resolutionNote: Corrective action assigned to Carlos. Daily check-ins scheduled. Re-inspection booked for Apr 7.

description: Customer requested deep clean of conference room B before board meeting Mar 28. Quoted and confirmed. Assigned to Carlos.
resolutionNote: Confirmed with Carlos for Mar 27 evening. Supplies ordered.

description: Facilities coordinator reported lobby glass doors not cleaned during Feb 14 service visit. Streaks visible through Monday.
resolutionNote: Added glass door checklist to HQ route. Verified clean on Feb 28 visit. Customer confirmed satisfied.

description: Monthly supply delivery completed — paper products, soap, and cleaning concentrates restocked across all floors.
resolutionNote: All items delivered and inventoried. Next delivery scheduled Apr 1.

description: Score 88/100. All areas in good condition. Lobby and restrooms noted as excellent. Minor feedback on stairwell — will monitor.
Monthly supply delivery completed. Paper products, soap dispensers, and cleaning supplies restocked for all floors.
resolutionNote: Delivery confirmed complete. Fragrance-free soap swap noted for next month.

description: Alex Rivera assigned to annex route, replacing James Scott who transferred. Orientation Jan 20. Now 63 days in — Green window.
resolutionNote: Alex cleared 44-day monitoring window with no issues. Performing consistently well.

description: Quarterly in-person visit with facilities manager Tom Bradley. Expressed satisfaction with service consistency. Renewal conversation started.
Score 86/100. Pass threshold met. Stairwell and loading dock areas noted as good. Minor note on breakroom microwave.
resolutionNote: Inspection logged and filed. Microwave cleaning added to checklist.

description: Supervisor requested replacement of aging floor buffer — current unit producing uneven finish on 3rd floor tile.
resolutionNote: New Tennant T3 buffer delivered and assigned to annex route. Old unit returned.

description: Monthly supply delivery to parking garage — industrial degreasers, oil absorbent, and entry mat replacements.
resolutionNote: All supplies delivered and stocked in garage supply room.

description: Score 72/100. Oil stain accumulation on lower level. Stairwell handrails need attention. Entry mats worn and due for replacement.
resolutionNote: New entry mats on order. Oil stain treatment scheduled for next service visit. Handrail cleaning added to checklist.
